patthana17.11:1.1.pli: Abyākataṁ parittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naparitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.11:2.1.pli: Kusalaṁ mahaggataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo namahaggato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.11:3.1.pli: Kusalaṁ appamāṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naappamāṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.12:1.1.pli: Kusalaṁ parittārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naparittārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana17.12:2.1.pli: Kusalaṁ mahaggatārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo namahaggatārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… avigate nava.

patthana17.12:3.1.pli: Kusalaṁ appamāṇārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naappamāṇārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.13:1.1.pli: Akusalaṁ hīnaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo nahīno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.13:2.1.pli: Abyākataṁ majjhimaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naabyākato namajjhimo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, ārammaṇe cha …pe… āsevane pañca …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.13:3.1.pli: Kusalaṁ paṇītaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo napaṇīto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.14:1.1.pli: Akusalaṁ micchattaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo namicchattaniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.14:2.1.pli: Kusalaṁ sammattaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo nasammattaniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.14:3.1.pli: Abyākataṁ aniyataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naabyākato naaniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana17.15:1.1.pli: Kusalaṁ maggārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo namaggārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.15:2.1.pli: Kusalaṁ maggahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo namaggahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.15:3.1.pli: Kusalaṁ maggādhipatiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo namaggādhipati dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.16:1.1.pli: Kusalo anuppanno dhammo nakusalassa naanuppannassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.16:2.1.pli: Ārammaṇe aṭṭhārasa, adhipatiyā tīṇi, upanissaye aṭṭhārasa. (Uppādī anuppannasadisaṁ.)

patthana17.17:1.1.pli: Kusalo atīto dhammo nakusalassa naatītassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.17:2.1.pli: Ārammaṇe aṭṭhārasa, adhipatiyā ekādasa, anantare samanantare soḷasa, upanissaye aṭṭhārasa, natthiyā vigate soḷasa. (Anāgataṁ atītasadisaṁ.)

patthana17.18:1.1.pli: Kusalaṁ atītārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naatītārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana17.18:2.1.pli: Kusalaṁ anāgatārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanāgatārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… avigate nava.

patthana17.18:3.1.pli: Kusalaṁ paccuppannārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo napaccuppannārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana17.19:1.1.pli: Kusalo ajjhatto dhammo naajjhattassa nakusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Ārammaṇe aṭṭhārasa, adhipatiyā nava, upanissaye aṭṭhārasa, purejāte cha, āhāre tīṇi, atthiyā avigate cha.

patthana17.19:2.1.pli: Kusalo bahiddhā dhammo nabahiddhā nakusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Ārammaṇe aṭṭhārasa, adhipatiyā pannarasa, upanissaye aṭṭhārasa, purejāte cha, āhāre tīṇi, atthiyā avigate cha.

patthana17.19:3.1.pli: Kusalaṁ ajjhattārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naajjhattārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana17.19:4.1.pli: Kusalaṁ bahiddhārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo nabahiddhārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana17.2:1.1.pli: Abyākataṁ vipākaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo navipāko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.2:2.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.2:3.1.pli: Kusalaṁ vipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo navipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ vipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo navipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ vipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo navipākadhammadhammo ca naakusalo navipākadhammadhammo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.2:4.1.pli: Akusalaṁ vipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo navipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Akusalaṁ vipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo navipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Akusalaṁ vipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo navipākadhammadhammo ca naakusalo navipākadhammadhammo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.2:5.1.pli: Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.2:6.1.pli: Abyākataṁ nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo ca naakusalo nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.20:1.1.pli: Abyākato sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo naabyākatassa nasanidassanasappaṭighassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Tīṇi veditakaṁ kātabbaṁ.)

patthana17.20:2.1.pli: Ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā tīṇi, upanissaye purejāte atthiyā avigate cha.

patthana17.20:3.1.pli: Abyākataṁ anidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca kusalo naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ anidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo naanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ anidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanasappaṭigho ca naakusalo naanidassanasappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.20:4.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.20:5.1.pli: Kusalaṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Kusalaṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho ca naakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.20:6.1.pli: Akusalaṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Akusalaṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Akusalaṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho ca naakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.20:7.1.pli: Abyākataṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ anidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho ca naakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.20:8.1.pli: Kusalaṁ anidassanaappaṭighañca abyākataṁ anidassanaappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.20:9.1.pli: Akusalaṁ anidassanaappaṭighañca abyākataṁ anidassanaappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanidassanaappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.20:10.1.pli: Hetuyā pannarasa, adhipatiyā pannarasa …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate pannarasa.

patthana17.21:1.1.pli: Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana17.21:2.1.pli: Adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.21:3.1.pli: Hetuyā cuddasa, adhipatiyā cuddasa …pe… avigate cuddasa.

patthana17.21:4.1.pli: Sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana17.21:5.1.pli: Dukkhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayutto naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana17.21:6.1.pli: Adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta. (Ekavīsati pañhā.)

patthana17.21:8.1.pli: Sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto abyākato dhammo nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttassa naabyākatassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.21:9.1.pli: Ārammaṇe ekavīsati, adhipatiyā dasa, anantare cha …pe… upanissaye ekavīsati, natthiyā vigate cha. (Dukkhāya vedanāya sampayuttaabyākatamūlaṁ adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaabyākatamūlampi kātabbaṁ.)

patthana17.22:1.1.pli: Vipākadhammadhammaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca navipākadhammadhammo nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.22:2.1.pli: Vipākadhammadhammaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca navipākadhammadhammo naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.22:3.1.pli: Nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.23:1.1.pli: Anupādinnupādāniyaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādinnupādāniyo nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.23:2.1.pli: Anupādinnaanupādāniyaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanupādinnaanupādāniyo nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.23:3.1.pli: Anupādinnupādāniyaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādinnupādāniyo naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.23:4.1.pli: Upādinnupādāniyaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naupādinnupādāniyo naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana17.24:1.1.pli: Asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.24:2.1.pli: Asaṅkiliṭṭhaasaṅkilesikaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naasaṅkiliṭṭhaasaṅkilesiko nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.24:3.1.pli: Saṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.24:4.1.pli: Asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.25:1.1.pli: Savitakkasavicāraṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasavitakkasavicāro nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.25:2.1.pli: Avitakkavicāramattaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naavitakkavicāramatto nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pannarasa, adhipatiyā pannarasa …pe… avigate pannarasa.

patthana17.25:3.1.pli: Savitakkasavicāraṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasavitakkasavicāro naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… avigate nava.

patthana17.26:1.1.pli: Pītisahagataṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca napītisahagato nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana17.26:2.1.pli: Sukhasahagataṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasukhasahagato nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana17.26:3.1.pli: Upekkhāsahagataṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupekkhāsahagato nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana17.26:4.1.pli: Hetuyā ekavīsati, adhipatiyā ekavīsati …pe… avigate ekavīsati. (Vedanāttikasadisaṁ. Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.27:1.1.pli: Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanidassanaappaṭigho nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasanidassanasappaṭigho nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… anidassanaappaṭighaṁ kusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasanidassanasappaṭigho nakusalo ca naanidassanasappaṭigho nakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.27:2.1.pli: Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanidassanaappaṭigho naakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasanidassanasappaṭigho nakusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… anidassanaappaṭighaṁ akusalaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasanidassanasappaṭigho nakusalo ca naanidassanasappaṭigho naakusalo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha

patthana17.27:3.1.pli: Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nasanidassanasappaṭigho naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naanidassanasappaṭigho naabyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ abyākataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nasanidassanasappaṭigho naabyākato ca naanidassanasappaṭigho naabyākato ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā …. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.3:1.1.pli: Abyākataṁ upādinnupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naupādinnupādāniyo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ upādinnupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo naupādinnupādāniyo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ upādinnupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naupādinnupādāniyo ca naakusalo naupādinnupādāniyo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana17.3:2.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, sahajāte tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.3:3.1.pli: Kusalo anupādinnupādāniyo dhammo nakusalassa naanupādinnupādāniyassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Kusalo anupādinnupādāniyo dhammo naakusalassa naanupādinnupādāniyassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Kusalo anupādinnupādāniyo dhammo nakusalassa naanupādinnupādāniyassa ca naakusalassa naanupādinnupādāniyassa ca dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana17.3:4.1.pli: Akusale tīṇi. Abyākataṁ anupādinnupādāniye tīṇiyeva …pe…. Ārammaṇe nava, anantare ekādasa …pe… upanissaye pannarasa, purejāte āsevane tīṇi, kamme cha, āhāre tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.3:5.1.pli: Kusalaṁ anupādinnaanupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naanupādinnaanupādāniyo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana17.3:7.1.pli: Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

Anidassanaappaṭighaṁ bahiddhārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanidassanasappaṭigho nabahiddhārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …pe… anidassanaappaṭighaṁ bahiddhārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasanidassanasappaṭigho nabahiddhārammaṇo ca naanidassanasappaṭigho nabahiddhārammaṇo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… avigate cha. (Pañhāvāraṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana17.4:1.1.pli: Akusalaṁ saṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo nasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

Abyākataṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nakusalo naasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Abyākataṁ asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naakusalo naasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuyā cha, ārammaṇe cha …pe… āsevane pañca …pe… vipāke tīṇi, avigate cha.

patthana17.4:5.1.pli: Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana17.5:2.1.pli: Kusalaṁ avitakkavicāramattaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naavitakkavicāramatto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā terasa, ārammaṇe nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate terasa.

patthana17.6:2.1.pli: Kusalaṁ sukhasahagataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo nasukhasahagato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … pañca. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā terasa, ārammaṇe nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate terasa.

patthana17.7:1.1.pli: Akusalaṁ dassanena pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naakusalo nadassanena pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.7:3.1.pli: Abyākataṁ nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā naabyākato nanevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana17.9:2.1.pli: Kusalaṁ apacayagāmiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nakusalo naapacayagāmī dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana18.1:2.1.pli: Hetuṁ sahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuṁ sahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana18.1:3.1.pli: Hetuṁ sahetukañca nahetuṁ sahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana18.1:4.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe ekaṁ, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… aññamaññe pañca …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana18.1:5.1.pli: Nahetuṁ sahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati nahetupaccayā … (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana18.1:6.1.pli: Nahetuyā ekaṁ, naārammaṇe tīṇi, naadhipatiyā pañca, napurejāte cattāri …pe… navippayutte ekaṁ …pe… novigate tīṇi.

patthana18.1:8.1.pli: Hetu sahetuko dhammo nahetussa nasahetukassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana18.1:9.1.pli: Hetu sahetuko dhammo nahetussa nasahetukassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Hetu sahetuko dhammo nanahetussa nasahetukassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Hetu sahetuko dhammo nahetussa nasahetukassa ca nanahetussa nasahetukassa ca dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo.

patthana18.1:10.1.pli: Nahetu sahetuko dhammo nanahetussa nasahetukassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Nahetu sahetuko dhammo nahetussa nasahetukassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Nahetu sahetuko dhammo nahetussa nasahetukassa ca nanahetussa nasahetukassa ca dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana18.1:11.1.pli: Hetu sahetuko ca nahetu sahetuko ca dhammā nahetussa nasahetukassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Hetu sahetuko ca nahetusahetuko ca dhammā nanahetussa nasahetukassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana18.1:12.1.pli: Hetuyā ekaṁ, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā dve, anantare cattāri, sahajāte pañca, aññamaññe cattāri, nissaye pañca, upanissaye cha, pacchājāte tīṇi, āsevane ekaṁ, kamme …pe… āhāre tīṇi, indriye pañca, jhāne tīṇi, magge pañca, sampayutte ekaṁ, vippayutte tīṇi …pe… avigate pañca. (Pañhāvāraṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.)

patthana18.1:13.1.pli: Hetuṁ ahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu naahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana18.1:14.1.pli: Nahetuṁ ahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanahetu naahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana18.1:15.1.pli: Hetuyā cattāri, ārammaṇe cattāri …pe… purejāte āsevane ekaṁ …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cattāri.
